channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Uncollected rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
Dog bin rubbish hasn’t been collected all week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 237, Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging, 27th March
item.description:
Tree overhanging could push fence too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped chairs as shown in photos, 27th March
item.description:
Chairs been tipped for c 1 week. Concern that it will attract further flytipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glendale Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ice cream truck blocking parking spaces, 27th March
item.description:
Ice cream truck blocking road and car spaces. Running engine next to school gates
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fenner Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 27th March
item.description:
Renault traffic - untaxed - collecting parking fines
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Thomas Court, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possibly unsafe tree near school, 27th March
item.description:
This tree is near the entrance to Unicorn Primary School and is inside their Forest school area. I'm concerned that it is unstable and may fall as the base is damaged and is coming apart. If it's not unstable please leave it as it seems to be providing habitat for wildlife.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Creswell Drive, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped building rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
Company has dumped sand and building rubble on the road next to someone's car. This happened at 13:16pm and we have photo evidence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Village Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not dog faece but huma faece, 27th March
item.description:
The location is beside 25-35 Hows street E2 8EE. Access from Winston Road on the alleyway. Beside the gates and adjacent to the recycling bins. Nasty!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hows Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive flytip down alley, 27th March
item.description:
They left bags of green waste multiple mattresses.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsground King Johns Walk Footpath, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 14 inch pothole on Crombie Road outside 25, 27th March
item.description:
This pothole has been here for 3 months. Can it be fixed as it is causing the house to shake every time a car or van goes past and could cause structural damage to our property. Please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Crombie Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This car is still there but job is closed !, 27th March
item.description:
Car obstructing street cleaning and taking up space. IT IS LISTED AS "SORN" and should not be on a public highway. Please have this car removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping on Street, 27th March
item.description:
Fly Tipping on Street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to entrance of 16-30 langridge athlone st, 27th March
item.description:
Discarded bike chained with no wheels
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talacre Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped again, seems to be someone's favourite dumping ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Falcon Public House, 341 Kilburn Lane, W9 3EG, 27th March
item.description:
A tag on the door of the property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree stump been dumped, 27th March
item.description:
A large tree stump has been left on the grass verge in front of the houses at the end of the slip road. Please could this be removed along with various bits of rubbish that seems to be getting thrown on there. Thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Door at The Falcon Pub, 314 Kilburn Lane, 27th March
item.description:
Graffiti on Door at The Falcon Pub, 314 Kilburn Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 27th March
item.description:
Decaying body of a fox on the small Green at the junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Village Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 27th March
item.description:
Decaying body of a fox on the small Green at the junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Village Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: How 102 Chatsworth dispose of their rubbish, 27th March
item.description:
Another day and another report! Again I see that folk come along and clear it all up and 102 are none the wiser!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
